title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming offered through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The course is taught by David J. Malan and maintains active communities across numerous social platforms.
writeup: Carter Zenke fields questions about how to approach CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming. The video notes that the course is available through multiple channels, including edX, the Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, and that it is taught by David J. Malan. It also points to the active communities CS50 maintains across numerous social platforms.
